channel.title: Video Uploader bot on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to make your own Doodstream video uploader bot on Telegram.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-PF63m1gh6T8/Yxp6onSnZRI/AAAAAAAANnY/MfFYoi0ehXYYkMaQAVkjZ8PSyKImyp3nwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1662679710657082-0.png" alt=""> In this world, inventors and companies in mid 19th century build alot of electronic devices with integration of softwares like for Instance GUI or CLI based operating system computers or personal computers and digital cameras etc which have ability to do physical real life tasks electronically by using them you can easily create digital files to store or create physical objects in digital form for various usage purposes.
